case_title: MAC DONALD BECKMAN, LLP VS QUINN, JAMES P.

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL SENT TO JAMES P QUINN RETURNED SIGNED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,066.59 FILED BY MAC DONALD BECKMAN, LLP AS TO DEFENDANT QUINN, JAMES P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAC DONALD BECKMAN, LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUINN, JAMES P. $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00, PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT BETWEEN PLFT MACDONALD BECKMAN LLP AND DEFT JAMES P QUINN DATED 01/27/03, JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN THE FOLLOWING AMOUNT. PLFT MACDONALD BECKMAN LLP IS AWARDED A MONEY JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1200 AGAINST DEFT JAMES P. QUINN. EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR ITS OWN ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COURT COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
